title: Perceptions of Upper Secondary Education: Ninth-Graders 2022
description: The survey charted ninth-graders' perceptions and opinions of general and vocational upper secondary education and training in Finland. Main themes included, among others, the ninth-graders' plans after completing lower secondary school, perceptions of how general and vocational upper secondary education are appreciated, and opinions on studying.
